name: The Wendy’s Company
description: The Wendy's Company is a prominent American international fast-food restaurant chain founded by Dave Thomas in 1969. Headquartered in Dublin, Ohio, the company is widely recognized for its signature made-to-order square hamburgers, which are prepared using fresh, never-frozen beef. Beyond its iconic burgers, Wendy's menu features a variety of items including freshly prepared salads, chili, baked potatoes, and the famous Frosty dessert. Operating thousands of locations globally, the company remains committed to its founding principle, "Quality Is Our Recipe," while continuing to innovate its menu and digital customer experience.
